hardware: 2x Intel Arc Battlemage G31 [PCI 8086:e223], 230 W cap each; AMD host CPU; model split across both GPUs (-sm layer -ts 1/1, all layers offloaded)
thinking_toggle: chat_template_kwargs.enable_thinking (true = thinking on, false = off); reasoning returned in reasoning_content field
max_tokens_policy: per-prompt cap (default 3072 thinking-on / 1536 thinking-off, long_context up to 4096), clamped to fit n_ctx
client_concurrency: 1 (run_eval.py issues requests strictly sequentially; at most one request in flight, so only 1 of the 4 server slots was ever active — latencies are uncontended single-request, not throughput-under-load)
